text_original: The skilful masters (of the Dao) in old times, with a subtle and exquisite penetration, comprehended its mysteries, and were deep (also) so as to elude men's knowledge.
text_normalized: The skilful masters (of the Dao) in old times, with a subtle and exquisite penetration, comprehended its mysteries, and were deep (also) so as to elude men's knowledge.

text_original: As they were thus beyond men's knowledge, I will make an effort to describe of what sort they appeared to be.
text_normalized: As they were thus beyond men's knowledge, I will make an effort to describe of what sort they appeared to be.

text_original: Shrinking looked they like those who wade through a stream in winter; irresolute like those who are afraid of all around them; grave like a guest (in awe of his host); evanescent like ice that is melting away; unpretentious like wood that has not been fashioned into anything; vacant like a valley, and dull like muddy water.
text_normalized: Shrinking looked they like those who wade through a stream in winter; irresolute like those who are afraid of all around them; grave like a guest (in awe of his host); evanescent like ice that is melting away; unpretentious like wood that has not been fashioned into anything; vacant like a valley, and dull like muddy water.

text_original: Let it be still, and it will gradually become clear.
text_normalized: Let it be still, and it will gradually become clear.

text_original: Who can secure the condition of rest?
text_normalized: Who can secure the condition of rest?

text_original: Let movement go on, and the condition of rest will gradually arise.
text_normalized: Let movement go on, and the condition of rest will gradually arise.

text_original: They who preserve this method of the Dao do not wish to be full (of themselves).
text_normalized: They who preserve this method of the Dao do not wish to be full (of themselves).

text_original: It is through their not being full of themselves that they can afford to seem worn and not appear new and complete.
text_normalized: It is through their not being full of themselves that they can afford to seem worn and not appear new and complete.
